leadText: The Big Pearl (Japanese: おおきなしんじゅ Big Pearl) is a valuable item introduced in Generation II. It is a bigger and more valuable version of the Pearl.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Big Pearl serves no practical purpose other than to be sold.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description G S C A big, beautiful pearl. Sell high. R S E Colo XD A lovely large pearl that would sell at a high price. FR LG A quite-large pearl that sparkles in a pretty silver color. It can be sold at a high price. D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 A quite-large pearl that sparkles in a pretty silver color. It can be sold at a high price to shops. X Y OR AS S M US UM A rather large pearl that has a very nice silvery sheen. It can be sold to shops for a high price. P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A rather large pearl that has a very nice silvery sheen. It can be sold at a high price to shops. S V ZA A rather large pearl that has a nice silvery sheen to it. It can be sold at a high price to shops.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price G S C HG SS $ 3500 $ 3750 R S E FR LG D P Pt W B2 W2 X Y OR AS BD SP N/A $ 3,750 B $ 38000 $ 3750 S M US UM P E S V ZA N/A $ 4,000 Sw Sh $ 8,000 $ 4,000 In the Generation V games, the Big Pearl can be sold to the ore maniac inside the Icirrus City Pokémon Center for $ 7500. In Pokémon Sword and Shield , the Big Pearl can be sold to the valuable item buyer in Stow-on-Side for $ 12,000. Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Big Pearl serves no practical purpose other than to be sold. Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description G S C A big, beautiful pearl. Sell high. R S E Colo XD A lovely large pearl that would sell at a high price. FR LG A quite-large pearl that sparkles in a pretty silver color. It can be sold at a high price. D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 A quite-large pearl that sparkles in a pretty silver color. It can be sold at a high price to shops. X Y OR AS S M US UM A rather large pearl that has a very nice silvery sheen. It can be sold to shops for a high price. P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A rather large pearl that has a very nice silvery sheen. It can be sold at a high price to shops. S V ZA A rather large pearl that has a nice silvery sheen to it. It can be sold at a high price to shops.
